specific_question: As of May 31, 2025, did Elexion Automotive’s asset management platform auto-generate warranty renewal reminders for critical production equipment?
answer: Yes. An internal Elexion Automotive update dated May 12, 2025 confirmed that Olivia Martinez’s asset management team enabled automated warranty renewal alerts for 146 production-line assets.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
